favicon-generator.whatItIs: The Favicon Generator creates website favicons from images or text. Generate favicons in multiple sizes for browsers, iOS, Android, and desktop shortcuts from a single source image or text.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Favicon Generator

steps.name: Upload image or enter text
steps.text: Upload a square image (at least 512x512) or enter text to create a favicon from letters. Choose background color and style.

steps.name: Configure favicon
steps.text: Set the padding, background color, and text style if using text. Preview how the favicon will look at different sizes.

steps.name: Generate favicons
steps.text: Click generate to create favicon files in all required sizes: 16x16, 32x32, 48x48, 64x64, 128x128, 180x180, 192x192, 512x512.

steps.name: Download and implement
steps.text: Download the favicon package. Copy the HTML code and place the files in your website root directory.

faqs.question: What favicon sizes do I need?
faqs.answer: Essential sizes include 16x16 (browser tab), 32x32 (taskbar), 180x180 (iOS), 192x192 (Android), and 512x512 (PWA). The tool generates all required sizes.

faqs.question: Should I use an image or text favicon?
faqs.answer: Image favicons show your logo and are more recognizable. Text favicons work for single-letter or short abbreviations. Choose based on your brand.

faqs.question: What format should I use?
faqs.answer: Use ICO for classic favicon.ico and PNG for modern browsers. Include Apple Touch Icon and Android manifest icons for mobile support.

faqs.question: Is the Favicon Generator free?
faqs.answer: Yes, generating favicons is completely free with unlimited usage.

favicon-generator.seoDescription: Generate favicons online for free. Create website favicons from images or text in all sizes. Download favicon package with HTML code for browsers and mobile.

logo-maker.whatItIs: The Logo Maker creates professional logos for businesses, brands, and websites. Design custom logos with templates, icons, fonts, and colors. Download logos in high resolution for web and print use.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Logo Maker

steps.name: Enter brand details
steps.text: Type your business or brand name and optional tagline. Select your industry for style suggestions.

steps.name: Choose a template
steps.text: Browse logo templates matching your brand style. Select a template as a starting point for customization.

steps.name: Customize the logo
steps.text: Change colors, fonts, icons, and layout. Adjust spacing and alignment until the logo matches your brand vision.

steps.name: Download your logo
steps.text: Download the logo in high resolution (PNG, JPG, SVG). Choose transparent background for versatile use across different backgrounds.

faqs.question: Can I use the logo for commercial purposes?
faqs.answer: Yes, logos created with the free tool are yours to use commercially. Premium plans offer full commercial rights and trademark-grade vector files.

faqs.question: What formats can I download?
faqs.answer: Free downloads include PNG and JPG. Premium plans offer SVG (vector) for infinite scaling and AI/EPS files for design software editing.

faqs.question: Do I own the logo I create?
faqs.answer: Yes, you own the rights to logos you create. Check the terms for specific licensing details on individual elements like icons and fonts.

faqs.question: Is the Logo Maker free?
faqs.answer: Basic logo creation is free with limited downloads. Premium plans offer high-resolution files, full commercial rights, and brand kits.

logo-maker.seoDescription: Create logos online for free. Design professional business logos with templates and customization. Download high-resolution logos for web and print.

app-icon-generator.whatItIs: The App Icon Generator creates app icons for iOS, Android, and web applications from a single source image. Generate all required icon sizes for app stores, home screens, and notifications.
features: Generate app icons from one image
Support for iOS and Android sizes

howToUse.name: How to Use the App Icon Generator

steps.name: Upload source image
steps.text: Upload a square image (at least 1024x1024) as your source icon. The tool uses this to generate all required sizes.

steps.name: Select platforms
steps.text: Choose which platforms you need icons for: iOS, Android, or web. The tool generates all sizes for the selected platforms.

steps.name: Generate icons
steps.text: Click generate to create all app icon sizes. The tool produces properly sized icons with correct naming conventions.

steps.name: Download icon package
steps.text: Download the complete icon package as a ZIP. Extract and place the icons in your app project directories.

faqs.question: What sizes are generated?
faqs.answer: The tool generates all standard sizes including iOS (all device sizes), Android (mdpi through xxxhdpi, adaptive icons), web app icons, and notification icons.

faqs.question: What format should my source image be?
faqs.answer: Use a square PNG image at least 1024x1024 pixels. Higher resolution sources produce better results. Avoid text-heavy images as they may be hard to read at small sizes.

faqs.question: Can I preview icons on devices?
faqs.answer: Yes, the tool shows previews of how your icon will look on different devices and home screen positions. This helps ensure readability at small sizes.

faqs.question: Is the App Icon Generator free?
faqs.answer: Yes, generating app icons is completely free with unlimited usage.

app-icon-generator.seoDescription: Generate app icons online for free. Create iOS, Android, and web app icons from one image. Download all required sizes for app stores and devices.
